metadata.homeDescription: The Nordeste Automóvel Clube (NAC) is a club passionate about motorsports. Discover our events, gallery and how to join us.

hero.subtitle: NAC is a club passionate about motorsports, dedicated to organizing meets and events for car enthusiasts in Bragança and the Nordeste Transmontano region.

home.memorableSubtitle: Check out the gallery from our latest meets where you can find photos, videos and much more.
home.aboutText: The Nordeste Automóvel Clube (NAC) is a club passionate about motorsports, dedicated to organizing meets and events for car enthusiasts. Our website is the virtual meeting point where we share information about the club, the exciting events we organize and how to get in touch with our team. Join us on this automotive journey!
home.upcomingSubtitle: New events coming soon. NAC works hard to create new activities.
home.noEventsHint: Check back soon for upcoming events!
home.merchSubtitle: Find our exclusive collection of NAC t-shirts and souvenirs and take the club spirit with you. Show your support and join the community!

events.title: New events coming soon
events.subtitle: NAC works hard to create new activities.

about.title: About Nordeste Automóvel Clube
about.subtitle: NAC is the meeting point for car enthusiasts in Bragança and the Nordeste Transmontano region.
about.story1: The Nordeste Automóvel Clube (NAC) was born from a shared passion for cars and motorsports. We are a group of enthusiasts dedicated to promoting car culture in the Nordeste Transmontano region.
about.story2: We regularly organize meets, drives, exhibitions and events that bring together lovers of classic, sports and all categories of cars. Our goal is to create a united and vibrant community.
about.story3: Whether you are an experienced collector or simply a car enthusiast, you are welcome at NAC. Join us and be part of this automotive family!
about.findUsHint: Visit us or get in touch.

footer.description: A club passionate about motorsports, dedicated to organizing meets and events for car enthusiasts.
